tw-bg-white tw-rounded-[12px] tw-px-5 tw-py-2.5 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-3 tw-shadow-sm tw-w-max tw-border tw-border-gray-100

a.class: tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-2 tw-text-gray-500 hover:tw-text-[#0f172a] tw-no-underline tw-transition-colors
tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-medium tw-text-[14px] tw-text-gray-500 hover:tw-text-[#0f172a] tw-no-underline tw-transition-colors

div.class: row o_wsale_products_main_row align-items-start flex-nowrap tw-w-full tw-max-w-[1200px] tw-mx-auto tw-m-0 tw-px-0 md:tw-px-4

oe_product tw-h-full
tw-w-full tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-pt-[80px] tw-pb-[120px]

p.class: tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-bold tw-text-[#212529] tw-text-[18px] tw-opacity-68 tw-leading-[28px] tw-m-0

div.p: Sepertinya barang yang kamu cari tidak ada

p.class: tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-medium tw-text-[#737373] tw-text-[16px] tw-opacity-68 tw-leading-[28px] tw-m-0

div.p: Coba gunakan kata kunci yang lain atau umum

div.class: products_pager d-flex justify-content-center pt-5 pb-3

form.class: card oe_product_cart h-100 d-flex tw-border-none tw-bg-transparent tw-shadow-none

t.t-value: keep(product.website_url, page=(pager['page']['num'] if pager['page']['num']>1 else None))

a.class: tw-bg-white tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-gray-200 tw-rounded-[14px] tw-overflow-hidden tw-shadow-sm hover:tw-shadow-md hover:-tw-translate-y-1 tw-transition-all tw-duration-300 tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-h-full tw-no-underline tw-group

div.class: tw-w-full tw-aspect-square tw-rounded-[10px] tw-overflow-hidden tw-bg-gray-100 tw-relative

span.t-options: {'widget': 'image', 'preview_image': 'image_512', 'itemprop': 'image', 'class': 'tw-w-full tw-h-full tw-object-cover position-absolute group-hover:tw-scale-105 tw-transition-transform tw-duration-300'}
span.class: oe_product_image_img_wrapper d-flex h-100 justify-content-center align-items-center position-absolute tw-w-full tw-h-full

div.class: tw-px-3 tw-pb-3 tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-flex-grow

h3.class: tw-font-medium tw-text-[#212529] tw-text-[13px] tw-leading-snug tw-line-clamp-2 tw-mb-1 tw-flex-grow

div.class: tw-flex tw-justify-between tw-items-center tw-mt-auto
tw-font-bold tw-text-[#212529] tw-text-[14px]
tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-1
o_wsale_product_btn d-none
